message:
feat(cli): add --emit-logic-table-shared flag for JIT compilation

Adds infrastructure for compiling @logic_table Python code to shared
libraries (.dylib/.so) at runtime for JIT loading.

Changes:
- Add --emit-logic-table-shared CLI flag in build_commands.zig
- Add emit_logic_table_shared option in main.zig CompileOptions
- Set emit_logic_table_exports=true when flag is used
- Compile to shared library without module struct wrapper
- Generate C-callable export wrappers for @logic_table methods

Note: The generated code currently has issues with list subscript
operations that use runtime.eval instead of direct array indexing.
This needs to be fixed for the JIT path to produce optimized SIMD code.
